transcripts.speaker: assistant
transcripts.text: After-hours pharmacy line. I can connect you to a pharmacist for medication questions.

transcripts.speaker: user
transcripts.text: My insulin dose changed yesterday. I need a pharmacist to confirm the new amount.

transcripts.speaker: assistant
transcripts.text: I'll warm-transfer you to the on-call pharmacist now. Please stay on the line.

transcripts.speaker: assistant
transcripts.text: You're connected with pharmacy. They'll take it from here.
